allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; print\('App loaded successfully'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m py_compile app/api/v1/evaluations.py app/api/v1/performances.py app/models/evaluation.py app/schemas/evaluation.py)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.core.database import engine; print\('Database engine created:', engine.url\)")
